video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. prop (mug_red_v1): state: on table, visually consistent. A film negative is held up to a light source, revealing a basement iron door with the Lin family name written on it. Narration: "底片对着灯，出现一扇地下室铁门，门上写着林家的姓。". Protagonist A says: "我们家没有地下室。". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. Close-up of a film negative held against a warm light source, revealing a dark basement iron door with Chinese characters '林' on it, high contrast, cinematic grain, shallow depth of field, mysterious atmosphere. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, cartoonish, low resolution, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
camera_motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift

action_beats: A film negative is held up to a light source, revealing a basement iron door with the Lin family name written on it.

table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S026/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
